title: Risk off tone weighs on sentiment
section_path: Risk off tone weighs on sentiment
section_path_text: Risk off tone weighs on sentiment
summary:
Main
A broad risk-off sentiment due to tariff concerns weighed on commodity prices. Renewed weakness in the USD supported precious metals. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-07-17 132949.png | assets/2025-07-17_risk-off-tone-weighs-on-sentiment_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_21c6fc95c9c1.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil prices fell for the third consecutive session as investors turn cautious on the prospect of a market surplus later in the year.

children.title: Main
children.summary: A broad risk-off sentiment due to tariff concerns weighed on commodity prices. Renewed weakness in the USD supported precious metals.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil prices fell for the third consecutive session as investors turn cautious on the prospect of a market surplus later in the year. US crude inventories fell more than expected, by nearly 4mb to 422mbbl, this is the first draw on stocks in three weeks.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: The number of rigs drilling for oil in the US continues to fall as shale oil operators react to the fall in oil prices. However, a new focus on gas rich regions as also played its part.
